title: Vera Bradley Announces Q4 and Fiscal Year 2020 Results
text: Vera Bradley reported Q4 2020 consolidated net income of $12.5 million or $0.37 per diluted share with adjusted earnings of $0.42 per share. Revenue was $156.9 million, below analyst estimate of $160.4 million. The company missed on earnings per share with reported $0.37 versus estimate above that level. For fiscal year 2020, consolidated net revenues totaled $495.2 million, an increase of 19.0% over prior year and included $65.9 million from Pura Vida acquisition. Excluding Pura Vida, Vera Bradley net revenues increased 3.2% to $429.3 million. On a non-GAAP basis, consolidated net income for fiscal 2020 totaled $28.2 million or $0.82 per diluted share. Challenges included customer focus during promotional and clearance periods resulting in reduced gross margin and higher-than-expected shipping costs.
